name: Drax
text: Drax gets +1 ATK for each vengeance counter on him. Response: After the villain attacks Drax, place 1 vengeance counter here (to a maximum of 3). If you cannot, draw 1 card.
real_text: Drax gets +1 ATK for each vengeance counter on him. Response: After the villain attacks Drax, place 1 vengeance counter here (to a maximum of 3). If you cannot, draw 1 card.

linked_card.name: Drax
linked_card.text: Forced Response: After you change to this form, remove all vengeance counters from Drax. Heal 2 damage from him for each vengeance counter removed this way.
linked_card.real_text: Forced Response: After you change to this form, remove all vengeance counters from Drax. Heal 2 damage from him for each vengeance counter removed this way.

name: Mantis
text: Action: Exhaust Mantis and deal 1 damage to her → heal 3 damage from an identity.
real_text: Action: Exhaust Mantis and deal 1 damage to her → heal 3 damage from an identity.
flavor: "Bring harm to this one at your own peril!"

name: "Fight Me, Coward!"
text: Hero Action: Ready your hero and draw 1 card. The villain attacks you.
real_text: Hero Action: Ready your hero and draw 1 card. The villain attacks you.
flavor: "Hear me, Thanos! Titan or god, I shall yet obliterate you!" —Drax

name: Intimidation
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove X threat from a scheme, where X is equal to your ATK.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove X threat from a scheme, where X is equal to your ATK.
flavor: "Pay close attention because I'm only going to say this once: walk away and you live." —Drax

name: Knife Leap
text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 for each vengeance counter on Drax. Hero Interrupt: When you make a basic attack, you get +5 ATK for that attack. That attack gains overkill and piercing.
real_text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 for each vengeance counter on Drax. Hero Interrupt: When you make a basic attack, you get +5 ATK for that attack. That attack gains overkill and piercing.

name: Parry
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent X of that damage, where X is equal to double your ATK.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent X of that damage, where X is equal to double your ATK.
flavor: "You are a fool to believe I'd fall to the likes of you!" —Drax

name: Payback
text: Hero Response (attack): After the villain attacks you, deal X damage to the villain, where X is equal to your ATK.
real_text: Hero Response (attack): After the villain attacks you, deal X damage to the villain, where X is equal to your ATK.

name: Drax's Knife
text:
Restricted (Max 2 restricted cards per player.)
While in hero form, Drax gets +1 ATK.
real_text:
Restricted (Max 2 restricted cards per player.)
While in hero form, Drax gets +1 ATK.

name: Drax's Other Knife
text:
Restricted (Max 2 restricted cards per player.)
While in hero form, Drax gains retaliate 1.
real_text:
Restricted (Max 2 restricted cards per player.)
While in hero form, Drax gains retaliate 1.

name: DWI Theet Mastery
text: Hero Response: After Drax makes a basic attack, draw 1 card.
real_text: Hero Response: After Drax makes a basic attack, draw 1 card.
flavor: "I will have my revenge against Thanos!" —Drax

name: Too Stubborn to Die
text: Hero Interrupt: When Drax would be defeated, instead set his hit point dial to 4, change him to alter-ego form, and remove this card from the game.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When Drax would be defeated, instead set his hit point dial to 4, change him to alter-ego form, and remove this card from the game.

name: Martyr
text: Response: After Martyr takes consequential damage from performing an attack, if that attack defeated an enemy, give her a tough status card.
real_text: Response: After Martyr takes consequential damage from performing an attack, if that attack defeated an enemy, give her a tough status card.
flavor: "You want to learn about pain? I'll teach you!"

name: Moondragon
text: Action: Exhaust and discard Moondragon → choose a minion. That minion attacks another enemy of your choice.
real_text: Action: Exhaust and discard Moondragon → choose a minion. That minion attacks another enemy of your choice.

name: Counter-Punch
text: Response (attack): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, deal damage to that enemy equal to your hero's ATK.
real_text: Response (attack): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, deal damage to that enemy equal to your hero's ATK.

name: Deflection
text: Hero Interrupt: When an identity would take any amount of damage from an attack, prevent up to 5 of that damage. Discard cards from the top of your deck equal to the amount prevented this way.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When an identity would take any amount of damage from an attack, prevent up to 5 of that damage. Discard cards from the top of your deck equal to the amount prevented this way.

name: Hard Knocks
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If that enemy is defeated by this attack, give your hero a tough status card.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If that enemy is defeated by this attack, give your hero a tough status card.

name: Leading Blow
text: Hero Interrupt: When your hero makes a basic attack, discard the top card of the encounter deck → reduce your hero's ATK for that attack by the number of printed boost icons on that card. If that attack still deals damage, ready your hero.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When your hero makes a basic attack, discard the top card of the encounter deck → reduce your hero's ATK for that attack by the number of printed boost icons on that card. If that attack still deals damage, ready your hero.

name: Subdue
text: Hero Interrupt: When an enemy initiates an attack, that enemy gets -3 ATK for that attack.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When an enemy initiates an attack, that enemy gets -3 ATK for that attack.

name: Indomitable
text: Response: After your hero defends, discard indomitable → ready your hero.
real_text: Response: After your hero defends, discard indomitable → ready your hero.
flavor: "We have no choice. So we fight — and we win. There are no other options." —Captain America

name: Gamora
text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Hero Response: After Gamora attacks or thwarts, discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an event, then add that card to your hand.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Hero Response: After Gamora attacks or thwarts, discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an event, then add that card to your hand.

name: Athletic Conditioning
text: Hero Action: Discard 1 stun or confuse status card from your hero.
real_text: Hero Action: Discard 1 stun or confuse status card from your hero.
flavor: "Don't worry, the ringing in your ears will go away... eventually." —Nadia Van Dyne

name: Energy

real_text: Max 1 per deck.

real_text: Max 1 per deck.

real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Memories of Another Life
text: Give to the Drax player. You may flip to your alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter-ego → remove Memories of Another Life from the game. • You are stunned. If you are already stunned, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Drax player. You may flip to your alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter-ego → remove Memories of Another Life from the game. • You are stunned. If you are already stunned, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

name: Cull the Weak
text: Each enemy gets +2 ATK
real_text: Each enemy gets +2 ATK
flavor: Yotat the Destroyer has made it his mission to rid the galaxy of those he deems inferior.

name: Yotat the Destroyer
text: Guard. Retaliate 1. (Drax's nemesis minion)
real_text: Guard. Retaliate 1. (Drax's nemesis minion)
flavor: "You will kneel before the true Destroyer!"

name: Challenge Accepted
text: Surge. Attach to the enemy with the highest ATK. Forced Response: After Drax deals 4 or more damage to attached enemy with a single attack, discard this card.
real_text: Surge. Attach to the enemy with the highest ATK. Forced Response: After Drax deals 4 or more damage to attached enemy with a single attack, discard this card.

name: "I Will Destroy You!"
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Yotat the Destroyer attacks you with +1 ATK. If no attack was made this way, the villain attacks you.
real_text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Yotat the Destroyer attacks you with +1 ATK. If no attack was made this way, the villain attacks you.

name: "Bring It!"
text: Max 1 per phase. Hero Action: Draw 1 card for each minion engaged with you.
real_text: Max 1 per phase. Hero Action: Draw 1 card for each minion engaged with you.
flavor: "You picked the wrong day, pal!" —Rocket Raccoon

name: "Think Fast!"
text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Hero Action: Take 1 damage. Confuse the villain.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Hero Action: Take 1 damage. Confuse the villain.

name: Regroup
text: Interrupt: When an ally is defeated by an enemy attack, return it to its owner's hand instead of discarding it. Forced Interrupt: When the round ends, discard this card.
real_text: Interrupt: When an ally is defeated by an enemy attack, return it to its owner's hand instead of discarding it. Forced Interrupt: When the round ends, discard this card.

name: Enhanced Physique
text: Uses (3 physical counters). Hero Resource: Exhaust Enhanced Physique and remove 1 physical counter from it → generate a [physical] resource.
real_text: Uses (3 physical counters). Hero Resource: Exhaust Enhanced Physique and remove 1 physical counter from it → generate a [physical] resource.
